entity.summary: Latin American centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded in Chile in 2015 and operating local-currency markets and professional trading services across Chile, Colombia, Peru, and Argentina.
entity.notes: January 1 is used as a year-level marker because first-party materials establish 2015 but not an exact launch day. HEI consolidates Buda.com, Buda, and the BudaPro professional interface as one exchange entity.

evidence.title: Buda.com team and company history
evidence.notes: First-party company page states that Buda.com was founded in 2015, is based in Santiago, and develops and operates cryptocurrency markets in Chile, Colombia, Peru, and Argentina.

evidence.title: Buda exchange markets and activity
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile reports current spot markets, recent trading activity, Chilean incorporation, and the 2015 establishment year.
